description: The Ramacca Mafia family is a crime family of the Sicilian Cosa Nostra, operating primarily in the town of Ramacca, Sicily. Founded in the 1950s by Calogero 'Liddu' Conti, it engages in extortion, infiltration of public contracts, and political influence. The family has maintained control over local economic interests and alliances with powerful neighboring families. It remains active, with recent leadership transitions and ongoing criminal operations.
